title: phyla javanica
intro: Phyla javanica, also known as Frog's Breath or Texas frog's bladderwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae and the genus Phyla. It is native to the Americas and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The plant is known for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to clear mucus from the lungs and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Phyla javanica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and promote overall health and well-being.
